scripts.health: node -e "require('http').get('http://localhost:' + (process.env.WEBHOOK_PORT || 3000) + '/health', r => { let d=''; r.on('data', c => d+=c); r.on('end', () => console.log(JSON.parse(d))); }).on('error', e => { console.error('Engine not running:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.verify-audit: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {verifyTodayLog} = require('./src/secureAuditLog'); const r = verifyTodayLog(); console.log(r); process.exit(r.ok ? 0 : 1);"
